files.notes: This file contains four complete lesson sections for April. Lesson II appears to be incomplete or very short, containing only the header. The lessons cover Theology (Card Playing), Work and Business, Literature (Washington Irving), and Social Service (Courtship). There's also a Teachers' Topic section at the end that appears to be part of the guide lessons structure.
